rationale: Educ. Code §19.004 governs a specific education district that is prohibited from imposing taxes. The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) does not conflict with this district's governance or tax prohibition.
quote: The district may not impose a tax.
_note: No conflict. Section 19.004 concerns a district barred from levying taxes; homestead exemption changes under Tax Code §11.13(b) are inapplicable to this district.
